scope: composition root, kernel, capability providers, UI adapters and agent pool diff

findings.message: Crash-prone isolated writer worktrees could be orphaned.
findings.disposition: Isolated worktrees are registered in a process-level cleanup map and removed on cleanup/beforeExit/exit where possible; manual git worktree prune remains an external crash recovery fallback.

findings.message: Subprocess JSON event usage parsing ignored partial lines.
findings.disposition: Stdout JSON parsing now buffers incomplete lines across chunks and accumulates usage from any message.usage payload.

findings.message: Provider-unavailable action result construction was duplicated.
Model preflight health checks ran sequentially.
findings.disposition: Model health preflight now runs checks with `Promise.all` and records results afterward.

findings.message: Dynamic require of `@earendil-works/pi-ai` leaked module-loader complexity.
findings.disposition: Replaced dynamic require with a static import of `complete`.

findings.message: All redirects are blocked, including same-host upgrades.
findings.disposition: Conservative redirect denial is intentional for this security-sensitive harness; safe redirect following can be added later as a separate policy transform.

findings.message: Write-scope overlap may be conservative for some glob pairs.
findings.disposition: False positives reduce concurrency but preserve writer isolation; no unsafe false-negative case was identified in the covered tests.
